data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizes user decision time by reducing options on the interface.
data.technical_spec: Focus on simplicity and hiding complex features until needed.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes interface design to require minimal movement for user actions.
data.technical_spec: Placement of interactive elements within easy reach for frequent actions.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Emphasizes appealing visual design to improve perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Consistent color scheme and typography across the app.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Maintains behavioral consistency with common app designs to reduce learning curve.
data.technical_spec: Adopts UI patterns familiar to social media users.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items together on the interface for better cognitive understanding.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes spacing and layout to enhance content relationships.
